title: Love is a Demon
description:
Love, Friendship & Supernatural ChaosWill Ash find the courage to confess their feelings, or will otherworldly chaos derail their plans?

 

Love is a Demon is a narrative adventure game that takes you on a heartfelt and hilarious ride through the complexities of romance and personal growth. Step into the shoes of Ash, an introverted dreamer finally ready to confess their feelings to their best friend, Ivy. But just as everything seems to fall into place, an unforeseen supernatural event throws their world into disarray, and they have to embark on an unpredictable adventure.

Humour & PuzzlesEnjoy witty dialogue, quirky interactions, and absurd situations that make love feel messier than ever. Have you ever considered what doing dishes says about your relationship? Solve puzzles that reflect the ups and downs of Ash’s journey.

Choose your heroThere are three appearances for Ash. You can choose the one that you identify with the most. 

Choices & Multiple EndingsYour decisions shape relationships, emotional outcomes, and determine the outcomes of this love story.

Sometimes there’s no right answer, only an honest one.

Love interestsIvyShe’s a travel agent who never found her own place. Life spins faster, higher, and dangerously brighter when she’s around, and there is no way to stop it.

LunaA gentle spirit who grounds chaos with a single breath. Discipline, calmness, and kindness are her strengths, and under it lies a deeper connection to the world, as if she moves in tune with something unseen.

• Live the Story – Explore Ash’s world through immersive, interactive moments that pull you deeper into their journey.

• Shape the Narrative – Every choice you make influences Ash’s relationships and leads to different outcomes.

• Humour & Puzzles – Enjoy witty dialogue, quirky interactions, and absurd situations that make love feel messier than ever.

• Emotional Journey: Explore love, friendship, and self-discovery through relatable moments that resonate with your heart.

• Solve & Explore: Solve fun puzzles that reflect the ups and downs of Ash’s journey.

• Multiple Endings: Your decisions shape Ash’s path and determine the outcomes of their love story.

• Character Exploration: Build relationships, uncover backstories, and explore how each character’s dynamics influence the journey.

Your choices. Your love life. Your demonic mess.
description_short: Love is a Demon is an adventure game packed with romance, chaos, and supernatural surprises. Confess your crush, dodge demons, and embrace the mess; love has never been this complicated. Your choices shape Ash’s love life in this heartfelt, hilarious story-driven experience.
